title: carex lupulina
intro: Carex lupulina, also known as the fox sedge or fox-tail sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex lupulina include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Carex lupulina can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
